Turn N+1 execution → strategy + exploration enforced
Most systems fail here because they try to apply influence
in the same turn it is computed
That’s a real control system property.

all systems → single resolved state → guaranteed coherence

You are implementing Goal-Conditioned Intelligence in /opt/OS.

The system optimizes locally (per turn), but has NO explicit global objective.
Introduce a Goal Layer that conditions ALL system behavior.
